templates.title: The Caliph's Shifting Favor
templates.scene: In {year}, word reaches {member} that the court's mood has turned. In {place}, a single decree can raise a house or break it — and {rival} is whispering in the right ears while {peril} gathers.

choices.text: {member} buys back favor with gold and flattery
choices.outcome: The decree is stayed — for a price the treasury will feel.

choices.text: {member} withdraws into study, above the intrigue
choices.outcome: Out of the court's eye is out of its blade's reach — for now.

templates.title: The Long Caravan
templates.scene: A trade venture out of {place} promises a fortune from the eastern roads — silk, paper, spice. But the road is long and {peril} waits for the {surname} caravan beyond the last waystation.

choices.text: Fund the caravan and gamble on the eastern markets
choices.outcome: Two years on the road; a fortune in paper and silk if it returns.

choices.text: Keep the capital near {place} and the family's own walls
choices.outcome: Smaller margins, surer coin. The {surname} coffers fill slowly.
